supersedes: audits/signup-email-shape-snapshot-2026-05-28.json (immutable historical record; predated REFERRAL-LIGHT-W1's key field too)
purpose: Public-shape SoT after the mint-gate lift: EVERY signup now mints an av_free_ key (idempotent) + returns the referral code/link; consent is no longer required (transactional key email; marketing opt-in recorded separately). Future modifications ship a NEW dated snapshot.
served_on: https://algovault.com/api/signup-email (apex — scoped Caddy reverse_proxy so the /referral form POSTs same-origin; no CORS widening)

email.constraints: max 254; EMAIL_RE; lower-cased; + disposable-domain block (mailchecker) + MX check (fail-open transient)

optin_consent.constraints: OPTIONAL (D4). true → recorded in signup_emails (marketing list). The key + key-email are transactional regardless.

ref.constraints: a referral code; valid non-self ref → +500 referee bonus + attribution (referral-exclusive)

response_key_notes.key: the caller's OWN newly-minted-or-existing av_free_ key (over their own request; NEVER logged). Present on EVERY 200.
response_key_notes.referral_applied: true ONLY when a valid non-self ref applied (additive).
response_key_notes.bonus_calls: the +500 referee bonus, ONLY when referral_applied (referral-exclusive).

forbidden_note: `key` (the caller's OWN key) is allowed + intentional; a field literally named `api_key`, or ANY other user's key, is forbidden. No outcome_*/PII.
contract_change_vs_2026-05-28: key/referral_code/referral_link now returned on EVERY 200 (were absent / referral-only).
side_effects: mintFreeKey(email) — INSERT (idempotent on email) into free_keys (the universal free account)
ensureUserCode(key, email) — persist the referral code
INSERT/UPDATE signup_emails ONLY when optin_consent=true (marketing list keeps consenting-only semantics)
Fire-and-forget transactional key email (sendFreeKeyEmail non-referred / sendReferredFreeKeyEmail referred)
Console log success/failure (email masked; key NEVER logged)

consumers.name: /welcome paywall CTA form
consumers.binding: tight (now also mints a free account; key-email is account/link-framed, primary CTA stays UPGRADE)

drift_check_command: curl -fsS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"delivered@resend.dev","source":"referral-page"}' https://api.algovault.com/api/signup-email | jq -e '.ok==true and (.key|startswith("av_free_")) and (.referral_link|test("signup\\?ref=")) and (has("referral_applied")|not) and (has("outcome_return_pct")|not)' >/dev/null && echo DRIFT_CHECK_OK || echo DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL
